audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a neutral tone and moderate pace, accompanied by a subtle background hum.
temporal_description: Two men are visible in a dimly lit, narrow indoor space with tiled walls. One man, with short gray hair and wearing a light-colored suit, stands facing the other, who has dark hair and is dressed in a dark, patterned shirt. The man in the patterned shirt initially faces away, then slowly bends forward, lowering his head toward the floor. The man in the suit remains mostly stationary, turning slightly to observe the other man’s movement. The camera gradually zooms in on the man in the suit, focusing on his face as he looks toward the side, with a red decorative object visible in the background.
